chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 1308 of 2019 Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 5409/2019. 3.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 31-03-2022 Date of Decision: 31-03-2022 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for the Petitioner. O R D E R After being confronted as to the involvement of laches in this Petition, as apparently the Petitioner seeks release of salaries since his appointment made in the year 2010, Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner is still in service. However, we are not satisfied, as apparently Petitioner has approached this Court after lapse of considerable time in the year 2019. Accordingly, this Petition being hit by laches is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed in limine with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
